diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_evaluator.py
+++ b/inspect_evaluator.py
@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3

+"""Inspect VLABench Evaluator source code."""

+import inspect

+

+# Import Evaluator

+from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator

+

+# Print class structure

+print('=== Evaluator class ===')

+print(f'Module: {Evaluator.__module__}')

+

+# Print __init__ signature

+print(f'\n__init__ signature: {inspect.signature(Evaluator.__init__)}')

+

+# Print all methods

+print('\nMethods:')

+for name, method in inspect.getmembers(Evaluator, predicate=inspect.isfunction):

+    if not name.startswith('_'):

+        sig = inspect.signature(method)

+        print(f'  {name}{sig}')

+

+# Print evaluate method source

+print('\n=== evaluate method source ===')

+try:

+    src = inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate)

+    print(src[:3000])

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}')

+

+# Print evaluate_single_episode source

+print('\n=== evaluate_single_episode source ===')

+try:

+    src = inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate_single_episode)

+    print(src[:3000])

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}')

+

+# Check what attributes are set during evaluation

+print('\n=== Key attributes ===')

+for attr in ['results', 'episode_results', 'success_rate', 'task_results']:

+    print(f'  {attr}: {hasattr(Evaluator, attr)}')

+

+# Check the load_env import

+print('\n=== Environment loading ===')

+try:

+    from VLABench.utils import load_env

+    print(f'load_env found: {inspect.signature(load_env)}')

+except ImportError:

+    try:

+        from VLABench.evaluation.utils import load_env

+        print(f'load_env found in evaluation.utils: {inspect.signature(load_env)}')

+    except ImportError:

+        print('load_env not found in expected locations')

+        # Search for it

+        import VLABench

+        vlab_path = inspect.getfile(VLABench)

+        print(f'VLABench path: {vlab_path}')

+

+# Check Evaluator __init__ source

+print('\n=== __init__ source ===')

+try:

+    src = inspect.getsource(Evaluator.__init__)

+    print(src[:2000])

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}')
